sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95279" key="skulakei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῠλᾰκ-εία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n95279.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">breeding of dogs</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0007.tlg025:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Ma.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
